children.text: For the purposes of this chapter—

the term “appropriate congressional committees” means the Committee on Foreign Relations and the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate and the Committee on Foreign Affairs and the Committee on Appropriations of the House of Representatives;

the terms “Agency” and “Chief Executive Officer of the Agency” mean the United States Agency for Global Media and the Chief Executive Officer of the United States Agency for Global Media, respectively, and the position, respectively, authorized in accordance with this chapter;
the term “RFE/RL, Incorporated” means the corporation having the corporate title described in

children.tail: So in original. Probably should be followed by “; and”.

children.text: the term “salary or other compensation” includes any deferred compensation or pension payments, any payments for expenses for which the recipient is not obligated to itemize, and any payments for personnel services provided to an employee of RFE/RL, Incorporated.
Pub. L. 114–328, div. A, title XII, § 1288(8)
Pub. L. 116–283, div. A, title XII, § 1299Q(e)(10)
